## Raymond James reaffirms Strong Buy rating on Coherent Corp.

A routine rating reaffirmation adds no new data point to the COHR thesis; it is only actionable if the PM is tracking sell-side conviction breadth across the networking name, in which case the reaffirm is a minor positive amid the broader sector churn.
